g.text: 1. Packaging the MB2 and TOS event log
2. Updating the MB2 and TOS event log into PCR0
Gathering the fTPM Data from OP-TEE DTB and EKB
Kernel Boots Up To User Space
(Only needs to be done at 1st startup time for initial provisioning)
2. fTPM Root Seed = KDF(key=fTPM_Seed, const str)
2. Storing EPS in fTPM NV memory
2. Taking the ownership of the fTPM
(Setting up the authentication value for the fTPM owner)
5. Writing the EK certificates into fTPM NV memory
fTPM has been provisioned and activated.
